artifact_summary: Screenshot of a SCADA 'Open/Close Valve Faceplate' for 'Knife Gate No.1' displaying control source, valve status, and control status sections.
artifact_blurb: A SCADA system interface screenshot depicting the operational faceplate for 'Knife Gate No.1'. The display includes dedicated sections for 'Control Source', 'Valve Status', and 'Control Status', accompanied by relevant status icons and actuation buttons.
